label: Debris graphic
description: A single visual layer within an OrbitalDebrisDef graphics list. The renderer combines multiple DebrisGraphic layers at different parallax depths to produce the orbital debris belt effect.

graphicData.label: Graphic data
graphicData.description: Texture and shader settings for this debris graphic layer.

weighting.label: Weighting
weighting.description: Relative probability weight controlling how densely this graphic variant appears in the debris belt. Higher values mean more instances. Defaults to 1.

order.label: Order
order.description: Rendering layer order. Lower values draw behind higher values. Shipped data uses 1 (background), 2 (midground), 3 (foreground). Defaults to 0.

parallaxPer10Cells.label: Parallax per 10 cells
parallaxPer10Cells.description: How many world cells of parallax offset this layer shifts per 10 cells of camera movement. Lower values (0.2) produce slow-moving background elements; higher values (2) produce fast-moving foreground elements. Defaults to 1.
